heading: Marsh-Billings-Rockefeller National Historical Park Scenic Zone
label: 410vv–3 Marsh-Billings-Rockefeller National Historical Park Scenic Zone
notes: Amendments1998— substituted “Marsh-Billings-Rockefeller” for “Marsh-Billings” in section catchline and wherever appearing in subsecs. (a) and (b).Pub. L. 105–277
amendments: Amendments1998— substituted “Marsh-Billings-Rockefeller” for “Marsh-Billings” in section catchline and wherever appearing in subsecs. (a) and (b).Pub. L. 105–277

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: There is established the Marsh-Billings-Rockefeller National Historical Park Scenic Zone (hereinafter in this subchapter referred to as the “scenic zone”), which shall include those lands as generally depicted on the map entitled “Marsh-Billings-Rockefeller National Historical Park Scenic Zone Map” and dated .November 19, 1991

children.heading: Purpose
children.label: b Purpose
children.text: The purpose of the scenic zone shall be to protect portions of the natural setting beyond the park boundaries that are visible from the Marsh-Billings-Rockefeller Mansion, by such means and in such a manner as will permit current and future compatible uses.

children.heading: Acquisition of scenic easements
children.label: c Acquisition of scenic easements
children.text: Within the boundaries of the scenic zone, the Secretary is authorized only to acquire scenic easements by donation.
